title: Under the Spell of Quartz Crystals (EADF2026)

title_lang.en: Under the Spell of Quartz Crystals (EADF2026)

synopsis:
Quartz crystals – the elegant structures from inside the mountains – have attracted Crystal seekers into the mountains of Uri for centuries. The film accompanies them on their difficult and dangerous task inside the archaic mountain arena, which has undergone such notable developments in recent years. The passion to discover treasures, to expose themselves to the elemental forces of nature and to trace the creation and the meaning of the crystals remains intact. A journey of discovery – a treasure hunt in an impressive natural landscape.

 

Solothurn Film Festival

Solothurn Film Festival
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
水晶獵人在瑞士中部的烏里州尋找水晶多年，一代傳一代冒險在懸崖峭壁搜尋水晶的痕跡。稱水晶為「永結之冰」的他們最注重的並不是水晶的價錢，而是尋獲水晶的那一瞬間。鏡頭捕捉他們的腳步跟隨着季節的變遷、地殼的移動，在美麗動人的山脈中逐寸探索。人和自然寂靜而温柔的共震可以繼續多久？隨着全球暖化冰川融化，更多水晶被發挖，人類在凝視晶瑩剔透的水晶之時，除了折射出的好奇和讚嘆之外，又反映了怎樣的時代處境？

 

瑞士索洛圖恩電影節

subtitle: English
